creator: radiomlodychbandytow@o2.pl
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=mount_unionfs&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+9.0-RELEASE&arch=default&format=html

"The traditional mode uses the same way as the old unionfs for backward compatibility"
This text appears before any other mention about the way unionfs works. I think that majority of people reading this would like to know *what* does the option do first and historic reason later, if at all.
